hero.subtitle: Private Tours in the Netherlands
hero.description: Explore the famous tulip gardens, historic windmills, and charming villages with your own private driver. A truly unforgettable Dutch experience.

features.subtitle: Why Choose Us
features.title: The Best Way to Explore Holland
features.description: Skip the crowded buses and rigid schedules. With TravelTulipTours, you get a personal, comfortable, and truly Dutch experience.

items.title: Private & Flexible
items.description: Your own private vehicle and driver. No group schedules, no waiting. You decide the pace and itinerary of your day.

items.title: Flexible Duration
items.description: Book by the hour. Whether you want a half-day trip or a full-day adventure, we tailor the tour to your wishes.

items.title: Professional Drivers
items.description: Our experienced, English-speaking drivers know every corner of the Netherlands and share local stories along the way.

items.title: Fixed Prices
items.description: Know your price before you go. No hidden costs, no surge pricing, no surprises. Transparent pricing guaranteed.

items.title: Hotel Pickup
items.description: We pick you up at your hotel, Airbnb, or Amsterdam Airport Schiphol. Door-to-door comfort, no transfers needed.

items.title: Free Cancellation
items.description: Plans changed? No problem. Cancel up to 24 hours before your tour for a full refund. Completely risk-free.

tours.subtitle: Our Private Tours
tours.title: Explore the Best of the Netherlands
tours.description: Each tour is fully customizable. Choose your destination, set the pace, and let us take care of the rest. All tours include private pickup and drop-off.
tours.customTourText: Don't see what you're looking for? We create custom tours too!

items.title: Keukenhof Tulip Gardens
items.description: Visit the world-famous Keukenhof gardens with over 7 million blooming flowers. Walk through breathtaking tulip fields, explore the pavilions, and take a whisper boat tour through the surrounding bulb fields.
highlights: Pickup from your hotel or Schiphol Airport
Entry tickets arranged for you
Walk through the stunning tulip fields
Visit flower exhibitions in the pavilions
Optional boat tour through bulb fields
Photo stops at iconic tulip landscapes

items.title: Zaanse Schans Windmills
items.description: Step back in time at this open-air museum where Dutch villages looked like in the 18th century. See working windmills, a cheese dairy, clog workshop, and the famous green wooden houses.
highlights: Visit authentic working windmills
Watch traditional cheese making
See a real Dutch clog workshop
Explore the Zaans Museum
Walk through historic green houses
Taste local Dutch specialties

items.title: Giethoorn Village
items.description: Discover the 'Venice of the North' - a fairy-tale village with no roads, only canals. Glide through the waterways by whisper boat past thatched-roof farmhouses and beautiful gardens.
highlights: Private whisper boat tour through canals
See the iconic thatched-roof houses
Visit the charming village center
Lunch at a traditional Dutch restaurant
Photo stops along the canals
Scenic drive through the Dutch countryside

items.title: Amsterdam City Tour
items.description: Explore the Dutch capital with a private driver. See the famous canal ring, Anne Frank House area, the Jordaan, Vondelpark, and the Museum Quarter at your own pace.
highlights: Drive along the UNESCO canal ring
See the Anne Frank House area
Explore the charming Jordaan district
Visit the Museum Quarter
Photo stop at the I Amsterdam sign
Optional canal cruise addition

items.title: Kinderdijk & Rotterdam
items.description: Visit the UNESCO World Heritage windmills at Kinderdijk - 19 iconic windmills in a stunning polder landscape. Combine with modern architecture highlights in Rotterdam.
highlights: See 19 historic windmills at Kinderdijk
Walk or cycle along the windmill paths
Visit the Cube Houses in Rotterdam
See the spectacular Markthal
Explore the modern Erasmus Bridge area
Photo stops at iconic landmarks

items.title: Volendam, Edam & Marken
items.description: Experience authentic Dutch fishing villages. Visit the picturesque harbor of Volendam, the famous cheese town of Edam, and the former island of Marken with traditional wooden houses.
highlights: Stroll through Volendam's harbor
Visit a traditional cheese farm in Edam
Take traditional Dutch costume photos
Explore the former island of Marken
See the iconic Marken lighthouse
Taste fresh smoked eel and herring

included.subtitle: Everything You Need
included.title: What's Included in Every Tour

items.title: Private Vehicle
items.description: Comfortable Mercedes or BMW sedan (up to 4 passengers) or spacious van (up to 8 passengers)

items.title: Professional Driver
items.description: English-speaking, licensed driver who doubles as your local guide with insider knowledge

items.title: Hotel Pickup & Drop-off
items.description: Door-to-door service from your hotel, Airbnb, cruise terminal, or Schiphol Airport

items.title: Flexible Itinerary
items.description: Stop wherever you like, change plans on the go, and spend as much time as you want at each location

items.title: Bottled Water & WiFi
items.description: Complimentary water, snacks, and in-car WiFi so you stay connected and comfortable

items.title: Free Cancellation
items.description: Cancel or reschedule up to 24 hours before your tour at no extra cost

notIncluded: Entrance tickets to attractions (we can arrange these for you)
Tips for the driver (appreciated but not required)

howItWorks.subtitle: Simple & Easy
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Booking your private tour is simple. In just a few steps, you'll be on your way to discovering the best of Holland.

steps.title: Choose Your Tour
steps.description: Browse our tours or tell us what you'd like to see. We'll create a custom itinerary tailored to your interests, group size, and schedule.

steps.title: Get a Fixed Price
steps.description: Receive a transparent, all-inclusive quote within hours. No hidden fees, no surprises. Pay securely online or upon pickup.

steps.title: We Pick You Up
steps.description: Your professional driver arrives at your hotel, Airbnb, or Schiphol Airport at the agreed time. Step in and relax.

steps.title: Enjoy the Experience
steps.description: Sit back and enjoy the Dutch countryside, stop wherever you like, take photos, and create unforgettable memories.

faq.subtitle: Got Questions?
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.hereToHelp: We're here to help. Reach out to us anytime.

items.q: How do I book a private tour?
items.a: Booking is easy! Simply fill out the booking form on our website, send us an email at info@traveltuliptours.nl, or call us at +31 20 123 4567. We'll respond within a few hours with a personalized quote and itinerary.

Our prices depend on the tour destination, duration, group size, and pickup location. We provide transparent, fixed prices with no hidden costs. As a guideline: our Amsterdam City Tour starts from €220 and our countryside tours from €399. Contact us for an exact quote tailored to your needs.

items.q: How many people can join a tour?
items.a: Our comfortable sedans (Mercedes E-Class / BMW 5 Series) accommodate up to 4 passengers. For larger groups, we have spacious vans for up to 8 passengers. For groups larger than 8, we can arrange multiple vehicles.

items.q: Where do you pick us up?
items.a: We pick you up anywhere in the Netherlands! Most guests are picked up at their hotel in Amsterdam, but we also offer pickup from Schiphol Airport, cruise terminals in Rotterdam or IJmuiden, Airbnb locations, or any other address you prefer.

items.q: When is the best time to visit Keukenhof?
items.a: Keukenhof is open from mid-March to mid-May each year. The peak tulip season is typically mid-April when most varieties are in full bloom. We recommend booking early as this is our most popular tour and dates fill up quickly.

items.q: Can I customize my tour itinerary?
items.a: Absolutely! That's the beauty of a private tour. You can combine multiple destinations, add extra stops, spend more time at locations you love, or skip ones that don't interest you. Just tell us what you'd like to see and we'll create a perfect itinerary.

We offer free cancellation up to 24 hours before your scheduled tour. If you cancel within 24 hours, a 50% fee applies. No-shows are charged the full amount. We also offer free rescheduling up to 24 hours before the tour.

Yes! All our drivers are fluent in English and Dutch. Many also speak German, French, or Spanish. Our drivers are not just chauffeurs - they are knowledgeable local guides who share stories, history, and insider tips throughout the tour.

items.q: What type of vehicles do you use?
items.a: We use premium, well-maintained vehicles for maximum comfort. Our fleet includes Mercedes E-Class sedans, BMW 5 Series, and Mercedes V-Class vans. All vehicles have air conditioning, leather seats, WiFi, and phone charging facilities.

Yes, we can arrange entrance tickets for Keukenhof and other attractions at regular prices. We'll add them to your quote so everything is taken care of before your tour day. One less thing to worry about!

booking.subtitle: Book Your Tour
booking.title: Ready for an Unforgettable Day?
booking.description: Fill out the form and we'll send you a personalized quote within a few hours. No commitment required — just tell us what you'd like to see and we'll create the perfect tour.
booking.replyTime: We reply within a few hours

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your wishes, interests, or any special requirements...
form.noPayment: No payment required. We'll send you a personalized quote within a few hours.

thankYou.callText: In the meantime, feel free to call us at

footer.description: Discover the Netherlands with a private driver. From tulip fields to historic windmills, we create unforgettable Dutch experiences.
